title: Dekton 8pc 1/4" Shank Masonry Drill Set 3-10mm - Hex Shank, Ideal For Most Drills| 118 Degree Angle Point| Zinc Coated Carbon Steel| Includes Heavy Duty Storage Case| Durable & Precision Engineering
features: Versatile 8-Piece Set with 1/4" Hex Shank: The Dekton 5pc Masonry Drill Set includes five precision-engineered drill bits with a 1/4" hex shank, designed to fit most standard drills. The set covers a range of sizes from 4mm to 10mm, making it a versatile addition to any toolkit for drilling into various masonry surfaces, including brick, concrete, and stone.

Zinc-Coated Carbon Steel for Enhanced Durability: Constructed from high-quality carbon steel and coated with zinc, these drill bits offer exceptional strength and longevity. The zinc coating protects the bits from rust and corrosion, extending their lifespan and ensuring consistent performance even with heavy use.

Heavy-Duty Storage Case Included: The set comes with a durable, heavy-duty storage case that keeps your drill bits organized and protected. The case features designated slots for each bit, preventing damage and loss, and makes it easy to transport and access your tools whenever you need them.

118-Degree Angle Point for Precision Drilling: The drill bits feature a 118-degree angle point, designed for precise and efficient drilling in masonry. This angle allows for quick penetration and reduces the risk of bit wandering, providing clean and accurate holes every time. Ideal for both professional and DIY masonry applications.

Durable and Precision Engineering: Designed with durability and precision in mind, the Dekton masonry drill bits are engineered to handle the demands of tough drilling tasks. The high-quality materials and precision manufacturing ensure that each bit delivers reliable performance and maintains sharpness over time.
description: The Dekton 8pc 1/4" Masonry Drill Set is a top-tier choice for anyone needing reliable and precise drilling performance in masonry materials. This comprehensive set includes five masonry drill bits with sizes ranging from 3mm to 10mm, each engineered to tackle a variety of drilling tasks with ease. The bits feature a 118-degree angle point, designed to deliver sharp, accurate starts and efficient drilling through hard materials such as brick, concrete, and stone. This specialized point geometry ensures optimal cutting performance, reducing the effort needed and extending the lifespan of the bits. Crafted from zinc-coated carbon steel, these drill bits offer exceptional durability and resistance to wear. The zinc coating provides additional protection against corrosion, ensuring that the bits maintain their performance and appearance over time, even in challenging environments. The carbon steel construction contributes to the bits' strength and reliability, allowing them to handle rigorous use without compromising precision. The set includes a versatile 1/4" hex shank, making it compatible with most drills and ensuring a secure and stable connection during use. This feature enhances the efficiency of your drilling tasks by providing a firm grip that minimizes slippage and vibrations. The hex shank design also allows for quick and easy bit changes, helping you to maintain productivity and focus on the task at hand. For added convenience and organization, the Dekton 5pc Masonry Drill Set comes with a heavy-duty storage case.
